news.paragraph: Broadcom is increasingly positioned as a major player in the custom AI silicon market, fueling positive sentiment among some investors. Although the stock has recently underperformed the broader market, analysts are currently resetting price targets for the upcoming year. Options traders should consider this tension between recent price weakness and long-term AI growth potential.
headlines: Why Broadcom (AVGO) Is Becoming a Bigger Force in Custom AI Silicon
One Reason I Can’t Stop Buying Broadcom Stock
Broadcom Inc. (AVGO) Dips More Than Broader Market: What You Should Know
Citi resets Broadcom stock price target for the rest of 2026
